description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM GPU/GenAI/HSTU CUDA CI that runs on every pull request and push to the main branch, as well as on a nightly schedule and manually with optional inputs. The workflow generates a build matrix, builds, generates a test matrix, and tests FBGEMM GPU/GenAI/HSTU CUDA against PyTorch-CUDA Nightly, with optional PyPI publishing.
